Patch Set 3:

> Wow, this is a most awesome feature.

James, any idea how to actually *test* it?  Since I have to translate conf_param settings into set_param a before/after diff doesn't work  (even though the whole thing functions)

Patch Set 3:

Ben, it should be possible to add a test to conf-sanity to set some non-default parameter (eg. Current "max_rpcs_in_flight + 1") then reformat the filesystem, apply the YAML config, then check that the update is applied to the clients (you need to use wait_update_something to check for config changes since they are not instantaneous).

Patch Set 3:

> Ben, it should be possible to add a test to conf-sanity to set some
 > non-default parameter (eg. Current "max_rpcs_in_flight + 1") then
 > reformat the filesystem, apply the YAML config, then check that the
 > update is applied to the clients (you need to use wait_update_something
 > to check for config changes since they are not instantaneous).

Yep, that's simple enough.

Patch Set 5:

(3 comments)

Does this do any kind of filtering, to use only the last value of multiple cases of the same parameter is set?  That would avoid putting old cruft into the new config file.

Patch Set 5:

> (3 comments)
 > 
 > Does this do any kind of filtering, to use only the last value of
 > multiple cases of the same parameter is set?  That would avoid
 > putting old cruft into the new config file.

The test case simply re-applies the cruft.  I'd expect a real configuration tool to do the heavy lifting of applying only what is needed.

Patch Set 12:

ping for review

Patch Set 12:

> ping for review

Ben, I find it more effective if you ask specific reviewers, eg Shadow in this case, to review your patch again. 

That avoids the "there are other reviewers on this patch, I'll wait for one of them to review" problem, and also the "Andreas has already reviewed the patch, but has to come check the patch again and see if it has been refreshed and lost the review, but nope, still waiting on someone else to review" problem. :-). It happens more often than you think...

parents.subject: LU-6142 obdclass: Fix style issues for llog_test.c

commit.subject: LU-4939 utils: allow configuration through yaml files
commit.message:
LU-4939 utils: allow configuration through yaml files

add -F option to lctl set_param
file must be in yaml format.  Will accept either set_param
or conf_param formats and issue the appropriate commands

Reorganize set_param and conf_param infrastructures to allow
for shared code.

rename jt_lcfg_mgsparam to jt_lcfg_confparam
rename jt_lcfg_mgsparam2 to jt_lcfg_setparam_perm

Add test_806 to test reconfigure after writeconf

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity
Signed-off-by: Ben Evans <bevans@cray.com>
